title: rarely roasted mediterranean tiger prawns kebabs
description: pungent, tender, meal-prep mediterranean dish featuring raw tiger prawns, broil, high-protein-friendly
instructions: Thread 3 tiger prawns onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each prawn.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, and olive oil to make a marinade.
Add the prawn skewers to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the prawns marinate for 15 minutes, flipping them halfway through.
Meanwhile, mix together chopped parsley, crumbled feta cheese, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
Thread a piece of parsley-feta mixture onto each skewer, nestled between the prawns.
Place the skewers on a broiler pan and brush with any remaining marinade.
Broil the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
